title: Intralinks Splash Screen
description: A splash screen configuration for an Intralinks workspace, typically used to display NDA agreements, welcome messages, or branding to users entering the workspace.

id.description: Unique identifier of the splash screen.

hasAcceptButton.description: Whether the splash screen requires user acceptance.

splashText.description: Text content of the splash screen.

hasImage.description: Whether the splash screen includes an image.
